_comment: Example only. Your real config lives at $GW_CONFIG_DIR/accounts.json (default ~/.config/gw/accounts.json) and is gitignored. Create/populate it with `gw auth login --account <name>`. token_storage is 'keyring' (OS keychain, needs the optional keyring package) or 'file' (0600 JSON). token_file is optional; relative paths resolve under the config dir.
